title.description: Heading of the TLD (top-level domain) pricing page. 'TLD' is an acronym; keep verbatim.

description.description: Subheading explaining the page lists base USD prices for non-premium TLDs.

loadError.description: Error message shown when the TLD pricing table fails to load.

loadingMessage.description: Message shown while the TLD pricing table is loading.

emptyMessage.description: Message shown when no TLDs match the active filters.

nonPremiumNote.description: Footnote clarifying the listed prices apply only to non-premium domains. Keep the leading '**'.

tld.description: Table column header for the top-level domain. Acronym; keep verbatim.

registration.description: Table column header for the registration price.

renewal.description: Table column header for the renewal price.

transfer.description: Table column header for the transfer price.

registrar.description: Table column header for the registrar (admin-only column).

tld.description: Filter label for the TLD column. Acronym; keep verbatim.

registrar.description: Filter label for the registrar column.

variablePrice.description: Cell text shown when a TLD has no fixed price (price varies by domain).

variablePriceTooltip.description: Tooltip explaining that a variable price depends on the specific domain name.

notAvailable.description: Short placeholder shown when a price is not available. Typically 'N/A'.

perYear.description: Annual price line: the formatted amount wrapped in <price>{value}</price> followed by '/ year'. Keep the <price></price> tags and {value} placeholder verbatim; translate only the '/ year' part.
